a simple bookmark manager

Save, organize, and access your favorite links from any device with a fast and simple bookmark manager. Keep everything neatly structured, find what you need instantly, and stay productive without clutter.

get it on chrome get it on firefox

features

Our aim is to make bookmark management simple and efficient, helping you access your favorite websites quickly and stay organized without effort.

bookmark in one click

Organize your bookmarks effortlessly and access them with a single click. Keep everything in one place and enjoy a smoother, faster browsing experience.

intelligent search

Quickly find saved sites with a powerful search that understands what you’re looking for. Filter, sort, and locate your bookmarks instantly without digging through lists.

easy sharing

Share your bookmarks and collections with others in just a few clicks. Collaborate with your team or send links to friends without any hassle.
